description_long: This object is a modern assault rifle with a distinctive angular design, featuring a fixed stock and a curved detachable magazine. The body is primarily composed of a matte, light-colored material with black accents on the grip, magazine, and buttpad. The rifle includes a prominent barrel with a front sight post and a rear sight, both of which are integrated into the upper receiver. The trigger guard is well-defined, and the magazine release and safety selector are visible on the side. The overall construction suggests a robust, utilitarian build suitable for urban environments. The surface appears hard and smooth, with minimal texturing except for functional grip areas.
description: A modern assault rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and light-colored body with black accents. It features iron sights and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, front sight post, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, fixed stock, curved magazine, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the rifle's symmetrical alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and overall body contours.
